mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, uid, email, username, phone, account, password, op_password, role_id, access_key, secret_key, last_try_login_time, login_fail_count, login_locked, last_try_op_verify_time, op_verify_fail_count, op_locked, account_type, bind_type, bind_account, allow_local, disable, parent_id, user_status, contact_me, src, keyword, client_id, country, maintainer, last_date_update_pwd, union_id, sso_type, customer_id, saas_user_status, access_token, marketplace_type, use_mfa
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' limit 1

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE email = #{email} AND account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' limit 1

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE email = #{email} AND account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE account = #{account} AND (bind_type = 'INTERNAL' OR allow_local = 1) limit 1

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE email = #{email} AND (bind_type = 'INTERNAL' OR allow_local = 1) limit 1

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND (bind_type = 'INTERNAL' OR allow_local = 1) limit 1

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND account = #{subAccount} AND account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE email = #{email} AND account = #{subAccount} AND account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE account = #{subAccount}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE account = #{subAccount} AND uid != #{excludeUid} limit 1

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} and account = #{subAccount} and bind_type = #{bindType}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE bind_account = #{bindAccount} and bind_type = #{bindType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.auth.AccountBindType}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE uid = #{uid}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE access_key = #{accessKey}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE uid in #{item}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE username = #{userName}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
SELECT count(*) FROM dm_auth_user WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' and email != 'inner@clougence.com' and disable = 0 order by username asc

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE maintainer = 1 and disable = 0 and login_locked = 0 order by username asc limit 5

SELECT uid, username FROM dm_auth_user WHERE (id = #{primaryId} or parent_id = #{primaryId}) and disable = 0 and login_locked = 0 and ( phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') or username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') or email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') or uid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') )
order by username asc

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE union_id = #{unionId} AND account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' AND sso_type = #{ssoType} limit 1

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user WHERE parent_id = #{primaryId} AND disable = false

SELECT a.uid, a.username, b.role_auth_labels, c.res_auth_label FROM dm_auth_user a LEFT JOIN dm_auth_role b ON a.role_id = b.id LEFT JOIN dm_auth_res c ON a.uid = c.owner_uid WHERE a.account_type = #{accountType} AND a.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.res_id = #{resId} AND #{resPath} like concat(c.res_path,'%')
SELECT count(*) FROM dm_auth_user WHERE account_type = 'PRIMARY_ACCOUNT' and email != 'inner@clougence.com' and disable = 0
SELECT count(*) FROM dm_auth_user WHERE account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT' AND email != 'inner@clougence.com' AND disable = 0
SELECT count(*) FROM dm_auth_user WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} and account_type = 'SUB_ACCOUNT' and disable = 0

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_user where id in #{item}
mapper.update: UPDATE dm_auth_user SET last_try_login_time = #{lastTryLoginTime}, login_fail_count = #{loginFailCount}, login_locked = #{loginLocked} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dm_auth_user SET password = #{password}, last_date_update_pwd = now() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE dm_auth_user
account = #{subAccount},
username = #{userName},
WHERE uid = #{uid}

UPDATE dm_auth_user
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
WHERE uid = #{uid}
UPDATE dm_auth_user SET access_key = #{accessKey}, secret_key = #{secretKey} WHERE uid = #{uid}
UPDATE dm_auth_user SET union_id = #{unionId}, sso_type = #{ssoType} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dm_auth_user SET last_date_update_pwd = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT dm_auth_user.id, dm_auth_user.gmt_create, dm_auth_user.gmt_modified, dm_auth_user.uid, dm_auth_user.email, dm_auth_user.username, dm_auth_user.phone, dm_auth_user.account, dm_auth_user.password, dm_auth_user.op_password, dm_auth_user.role_id, dm_auth_user.access_key, dm_auth_user.secret_key, dm_auth_user.last_try_login_time, dm_auth_user.login_fail_count, dm_auth_user.login_locked, dm_auth_user.last_try_op_verify_time, dm_auth_user.op_verify_fail_count, dm_auth_user.op_locked, dm_auth_user.account_type, dm_auth_user.bind_type, dm_auth_user.bind_account, dm_auth_user.allow_local, dm_auth_user.disable, dm_auth_user.parent_id, dm_auth_user.user_status, dm_auth_user.contact_me, dm_auth_user.src, dm_auth_user.keyword, dm_auth_user.client_id, dm_auth_user.country, dm_auth_user.maintainer, dm_auth_user.last_date_update_pwd, dm_auth_user.union_id, dm_auth_user.sso_type, dm_auth_user.customer_id, dm_auth_user.saas_user_status, dm_auth_user.access_token, dm_auth_user.marketplace_type, dm_auth_user.use_mfa FROM dm_auth_user left join dm_auth_role ON dm_auth_user.role_id=dm_auth_role.id WHERE parent_id=#{pid} and JSON_CONTAINS(dm_auth_role.role_auth_labels, '["' #{authLabel} '"]')
SELECT username FROM dm_auth_user WHERE uid = #{uid}

SELECT a.uid, a.username, b.role_auth_labels, c.res_auth_label, c.res_id FROM dm_auth_user a LEFT JOIN dm_auth_role b ON a.role_id = b.id LEFT JOIN dm_auth_res c ON a.uid = c.owner_uid WHERE a.account_type = #{accountType} AND a.parent_id = #{parentId}
